FOLLOWING REPORTS FROM THE PUBLIC RELAYED TO THE NWS BY THE MEDIA, A TEAM SURVEYED THE AREA THIS MORNING. A BRIEF TORNADO TOUCHDOWN WAS OBSERVED IN A PARKING LOT AT FORT LAUDERDALE HOLLYWOOD INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT. A LIGHT POLE AND A COUPLE OF SIGNS WERE KNOCKED DOWN. NO OTHER DAMAGE WAS REPORTED BY THE TOWER OR THE SPOTTER.
